scope_summary: Persist the Auto Context Saver Rule as a durable cross-project AIKB rule. GPT/Claude must proactively initiate Canvas-to-AIKB context saving at known lifecycle checkpoints (manual acceptance, ACCEPT of major gate, durable rule/decision change, before commit/push or Azure, new chat signal, long/unstable conversation, incident lesson, end of work session). Target convention: 01_PROJECTS/<PROJECT>/CONTEXT_PACK/LATEST_CHAT_HANDOFF.md (overwritable) + HANDOFF_<YYYY-MM-DD>_<SHORT_REASON>.md (dated archive). claude-vault SKIPPED_PROTECTED. No product source touched. No source commit/push. No Azure.

rule_persisted.name: Auto Context Saver Rule
rule_persisted.core_requirement: GPT/Claude must proactively initiate Canvas-to-AIKB context saving at known lifecycle checkpoints without waiting for Slava to ask. Save = writing 01_PROJECTS/<PROJECT>/CONTEXT_PACK/LATEST_CHAT_HANDOFF.md (overwritable) + optionally HANDOFF_<YYYY-MM-DD>_<SHORT_REASON>.md (dated archive).
auto_triggers: Slava phrases: создаю новый чат / новый чат / сохрани canvas / context saver / продолжим в новом чате / закрываю чат / закругляемся / на сегодня хватит
After Slava's Manual Acceptance of a gate
After ACCEPT of a major gate
Before Azure pre-flight / Azure resource gate
When conversation is long, noisy, or unstable (context window crossing 60% or many multi-step turns)
After a significant false-positive / incident lesson
Before ending a long work session
snapshot_content_schema_sections: Header (project, date, last accepted gate, current gate, status code, trigger)
Source repo state (HEAD, origin/dev, origin/main, working-tree note)
Last accepted gate (name, verdict, gpt-handoff path, key numbers)
Currently active gate (name, done-state cursor, boundaries)
Boundaries / forbidden (no Azure, no main push, no force, no DEEPSEEK key, no real PII, etc.)
Recent acceptance chain (last 5-8 gates, most recent first, one line each)
rule_persisted.safety_boundary: documentation/context only; must NOT change product code, commit/push source, touch Azure, edit sacred CLAUDE.md files, or read/log secrets; if AIKB write access uncertain, prepare Claude prompt or report BLOCKED/NEEDS_APPROVAL; never claim save succeeded if write failed
rule_persisted.reconciliation_rule: real code > runtime evidence > git state > gpt-handoff > AIKB > chat; if LATEST_CHAT_HANDOFF contradicts execution evidence, execution evidence wins, flag contradiction, propose AIKB_REFRESH_* gate
rule_persisted.applies_to: all future GPT/Claude sessions across all projects
